step.action: Run code review: check correctness, patterns adherence, and edge cases.
Run QA tests: assess coverage, generate additional tests, verify all pass.
Run security review: OWASP top 10, dependency scan, secrets check.
Check test automation coverage: verify CI integration, automated test execution, and coverage thresholds.
Review test quality: check test naming, assertions, isolation, and maintainability.
Performance review: check for N+1 queries, memory leaks, bundle size impact, and response time regressions.

step.inputs: code-review-result, qa-test-result, security-result, test-auto-result, test-review-result, perf-result
step.action: Aggregate all 6 review gate results into a unified review summary.
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with aggregated review results.
